channel.title: vtnet on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in vtnet on IT notes

item.title: checksum offload
item.description: TCP offload engine TOE is a technology used in network interface cards (NIC) to offload processing of the entire TCP/IP stack to the network controller. It is primarily used with high-speed network interfaces, such as gigabit Ethernet and 10 Gigabit Ethernet, where processing overhead of the network stack becomes significant. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/TCP_offload_engine On Virtual Guest disabling the cheksum may boost the newtork speed, for example on GCE when using FreeBSD add this to the /boot/loader.
